text: I feel a hesitant curiosity here. The dim lighting and closed spaces evoke a sense of secrecy and solitude, as if I am trespassing in a place meant to be still and silent. The faint glow of emergency lights and the enigmatic acronym on the wall ignite my philosophical inquiry into the relationship between light and darkness, and the boundaries between access and restriction. I sense the importance of observation—the world changes when watched in silence.
